# stepsRequired

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Reads and enables pagination through a set of `AppLevelRequirement`.

## Usage

```bash
csdk steps-required --vlevel <value> --vroleId <value> --first <value> --offset <value> --after <value>
```

## Examples

### Run stepsRequired

```bash
csdk steps-required --vlevel <value> --vroleId <value> --first <value> --offset <value> --after <value>
```
